UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores public information about a user.

approved.description: Whether the user has been approved by an admin.

activeSessionId.description: A unique ID for the user's currently active session to prevent concurrent logins.

sessionLastActive.description: A timestamp (milliseconds since epoch) of when the session was last confirmed to be active.

/admins/{userId}.description: A collection to designate users as administrators. The existence of a document grants admin rights.
